nasb.text: When it is My desire, I will chastise them; And the peoples will be gathered against them When they are bound for their double guilt.

esv.text: When I please, I will discipline them, and nations shall be gathered against them when they are bound up for their double iniquity.

cnv.text: 我必來懲罰他們； 他們被自己那雙重的罪孽捆綁的時候， 列國就集結起來攻擊他們。

ccb.text: 我要按自己的心意惩罚你们。 列国要联合攻击你们， 惩罚你们的重重罪恶。
